twitter_thread: LG monitors just installed a 34MB software package on my PC without asking. 77% of updates include junk features.
CapCut's 5MB image limit is a deal-breaker for high-res designs. Use it for thumbnails only.
CapCut's terms of service allow them to use your designs for marketing. Review before uploading.
CapCut's 10-layer limit is crippling for complex designs. Try Adobe Spark for more flexibility.
LG's silent installs via Windows Update highlight a major security flaw: 1 in 5 updates are vulnerable to hacking.
Test AI design tools with a 10MB file and 20 layers to expose their limits.
What's the worst experience you've had with an AI design tool's limitations? #aidesign #software
